items.name_en: 🌱 Brown mixed with brown-yellow 🍮 color
items.name_cn:
🌱 Brown mixed with brown-yellow 🍮 color
I L❤️oewe you
Crazy about the mini puzzle
A beautiful color that captivates countless goddesses
❤️Mini size: 18*12.5*8cm
❤️The bag's own weight is almost negligible, super practical. Carrying a phone, small wallet, lipstick, and powder feels effortless, making life easy and happy. 😇😇 (XS and Plus sizes are both fine)
❤️Authentic exclusive unpacked custom, high-end exclusive private custom hardware, imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship

items.name_en: 👄L New messenger bag👉11360,🎺 Featuring imported pebbled calfskin paired with a soft back leather, adjustable cotton webbing shoulder strap, comfort is greatly increased👍 As a perfect interpretation of the classic messenger bag, it offers functionality while maintaining a minimalist and elegant masculine silhouette. Fold-over top flap closure with double buckle fastening. Novel compact volume, suitable for smart practical style. Main features: Made of soft textured calfskin, webbing shoulder strap, herringbone cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, four rows of patchwork silhouette leather flaps, dimensions: 33*25*10.3cm

items.name_en: 💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
items.name_cn:
💋 This Dior Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Pre-Fall collection, stylish and practical with a unique design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a spacious interior compartment for daily essentials. It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

specs.rawTitle:

It has a slim leather drawstring closure for secure storage, plus a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the look. Small size, with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, suitable for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear
Main: Calfskin Lining: Calfskin
Size: 16×18×12cm Model: 2835 🎁

items.name_en: 🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁
items.name_cn:
🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁
Dimensions: 33CM~21.5CM~14.5CM
Style No.: 9165
Color: Antique Brown

items.name_en: 🔥 Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 creating a unique innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions 👄 adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft calfskin. 😻 Crossbody, shoulder or handheld *Adjustable detachable shoulder strap* Magnetic snap closure *Interior pocket* Synthetic leather lining* 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥

Model: 9047
Color: Silver Grey
Dimensions: 20CM~16CM~16CM

items.name_en: 🔥 New Glossy Calfskin 💥 Puzzle Fold Cropped handbag plays with geometric shapes again ⭐️ Inspired by the geometric lines of the classic handbag series, reinterpreted with inlays full of geometric architectural beauty, can be folded completely, a good companion for travel. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create soft and lightweight handbags, paired with low-key and elegant brand logos. This cropped version is made of glossy Nappa cowhide. 🌹 This continues the geometric aesthetics of the Puzzle series 🌼 Inspired by origami bags, allowing this Puzzle Fold Cropped to switch freely between 3D and flat 🌺 The leather is very fine. The Puzzle Fold handbag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series 👛 This version is made of soft glossy cowhide 🔥 Handle length 29CM Size: 39CM~12.3CM~12.5CM
